# Core Text Enumerations | Apple Developer Documentation

-  Core Text Enumerations 

API Collection# Core Text Enumerations

## [Topics](/documentation/coretext/core-text-enumerations#topics)

### [Enumerations](/documentation/coretext/core-text-enumerations#Enumerations)

[`enum CTFontDescriptorMatchingState`](/documentation/coretext/ctfontdescriptormatchingstate)Constants that track the progress of font descriptor matching.[`enum CTFontManagerAutoActivationSetting`](/documentation/coretext/ctfontmanagerautoactivationsetting)Sets the auto-activation for the specified bundle identifier.[`enum CTFontManagerError`](/documentation/coretext/ctfontmanagererror)Errors that prevent unregistration of fonts for a specified font file URL.[`enum CTFontManagerScope`](/documentation/coretext/ctfontmanagerscope)Constants that define the scope for font registration.[`struct CTLineBoundsOptions`](/documentation/coretext/ctlineboundsoptions)Options for getting the bounds of a line of text.[`enum CTRubyAlignment`](/documentation/coretext/ctrubyalignment)Constants that specify how to align the ruby text and the base text relative to each other when they have different lengths.[`enum CTRubyOverhang`](/documentation/coretext/ctrubyoverhang)Constants that specify whether, and on which side, ruby text can overhang adjacent text if it’s wider than the base text.[`enum CTRubyPosition`](/documentation/coretext/ctrubyposition)Constants that specify the position of the ruby text relative to to the base text.## [See Also](/documentation/coretext/core-text-enumerations#see-also)

### [Reference](/documentation/coretext/core-text-enumerations#Reference)

[Styling Attributed Strings](/documentation/coretext/styling-attributed-strings)Attributes to which Core Text responds when placed in a `CFAttributedString` object.[Core Text Structures](/documentation/coretext/core-text-structures)[Core Text Constants](/documentation/coretext/core-text-constants)[Core Text Functions](/documentation/coretext/core-text-functions)[Core Text Data Types](/documentation/coretext/core-text-data-types)[SFNT Support](/documentation/coretext/sfnt-support)
